description: Query the CEDS education data standard ontology

definition.name: ceds_lookup
definition.description: Search CEDS classes, properties, and option sets by name. Returns matching items with types and descriptions. Use this as the starting point for exploring the ontology.

query.description: Search term to find in class names, property names, and option set names

definition.name: ceds_explore
definition.description: Show a CEDS class with its properties and relationships. Returns the class definition, all properties with types, and relationships to other classes.

class_name.description: Exact CEDS class name (e.g. 'K12 Student', 'Assessment Result')

definition.name: ceds_option_set
definition.description: List all values in a CEDS option set (enumeration). Returns the option set name and all allowed values with descriptions.

definition.name: ceds_data_spec
definition.description: Full data specification for a CEDS class with resolved types. Shows all properties with their data types, option set values, and cardinality. Use for detailed data modeling.

class_name.description: CEDS class name to get full specification for

definition.name: ceds_search
definition.description: Semantic vector search across all CEDS ontology descriptions. Use natural language to find relevant classes, properties, and option sets by meaning rather than exact name.

query.description: Natural language search query (e.g. 'assessment scores for english language learners')

definition.name: ceds_path
definition.description: Find the semantic path between two CEDS classes. Shows how classes are connected through relationships and intermediate classes.
